failures.description: The agent selected the most expensive returned kettle instead of the cheapest one, despite the catalog results clearly showing item 1240311797 at $137.17 as the lowest-priced available Electric Kettle.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The tool output at index 3 was relevant and sufficient: it returned 11 available electric kettles sorted by ascending price, with the first item 1240311797 priced at $137.17. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer claiming item 2243454707 at $164.46 was the cheapest, which directly contradicts the tool result. This is a reasoning/selection error over the tool output, not an invalid tool call or underspecified intent.
